data.title: GREEN: Expand Part C trigger to cover path deprecation/relocation/rename
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add explicit trigger condition to Part C: 'Part C also activates when SCs reference moving, deprecating, removing, or renaming a file or directory.' Insert after existing trigger condition.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Part C trigger mentions moving/deprecating/renaming
  Verify: grep -A20 'When Part C triggers' plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md | grep -q 'deprecat'
- [ ] test-part-c-trigger.sh passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-part-c-trigger.sh
- [ ] Original Part C trigger still present
  Verify: grep -q 'creating or modifying a file' plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
